messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Stack Monitoring. Provide technical guidance on resource monitoring and database monitoring.
Como criar stack monitoring no compartment production?

Para configurar Observability no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar Log Group
oci logging log-group create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "production-log-group"

# Criar alarm
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "high-cpu-production" \
  --is-enabled true \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --metric-name CpuUtilization \
  --statistic MAX \
  --interval 5m \
  --threshold 85 \
  --pending-duration PT5M \
  --severity CRITICAL \
  --destinations '[{"serviceType": "ONS", "topicId": "<topic-ocid>"}]'
```

[MUTABLE] Custos de ingestão variam por volume.

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/StackMonitoring/overview.htm

You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Stack Monitoring. Provide technical guidance on resource monitoring and database monitoring.
Como configurar stack monitoring com security hardening?

Para configurar Observability no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar Log Group
oci logging log-group create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "sandbox-log-group"

# Criar alarm
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "high-cpu-sandbox" \
  --is-enabled true \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --metric-name CpuUtilization \
  --statistic MAX \
  --interval 5m \
  --threshold 85 \
  --pending-duration PT5M \
  --severity CRITICAL \
  --destinations '[{"serviceType": "ONS", "topicId": "<topic-ocid>"}]'
```

[MUTABLE] Custos de ingestão variam por volume.
